items.topic: AITA for leaving my phone on “Do Not Disturb” at night and making my mom worry?
items.script_text:
PART 2 OF 2
Title: AITA for leaving my phone on “Do Not Disturb” at night and making my mom worry?
Story: Also, my mom tends to be super overbearing, not in a normal, motherly way. She has literally said that whenever my sister or I go out, she can’t relax until we tell her we’re home. I’ve told her multiple times that those feelings aren’t normal, but she’s basically been the same for the past 30 years.
Final Reddit verdict: Most verdict-tagged comments currently lean NTA.

metadata.title: Part 2/2 | Reddit story: AITA for leaving my phone on “Do Not Disturb” at night a #shorts
